channel.title: Krea AI
channel.description: Krea AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: 8 Best Creative AI Image Generators in 2026
item.description: We spent a few weeks testing all the AI image generator tools we could get our hands on, and based on our experiences with them, these are the best.

item.title: 30+ Best Nano Banana Prompts to Copy & Paste in 2026
item.description: Copy 30+ Nano Banana prompts for Gemini image generation. Free templates for portraits, product shots, ads, characters, styles, poses, and multi-image blends.

item.title: 10 Best Style Prompts For AI Image Generation In 2026
item.description: We spent a few weeks testing a wide range of prompts across different aesthetics and styles for image generation, and based on our experiences with them, these are the best.

item.title: What Is Seedance 2.5 and What Can It Do
item.description: Everything new in Seedance 2.5: how it compares to Seedance 2.0, what changed with references and region editing, example prompts, and how to use it on Krea.
